home.title: Flexible RP Systems Built for Players and World Builders
home.description: Build a living world where farming, crafting, trade, and roleplay progression stay connected.

hero.headline: Build Your Realm. Shape Your Story.
hero.body: SL Colonies connects survival, farming, crafting, trade, and progression into one modular system. Players get meaningful loops. World builders get control over pacing, economy, and identity.

why.title: One Connected System
why.body: Gathering, production, economy, and roleplay progression are designed to reinforce each other instead of living in disconnected tools.

why.title: Configurable for Different Realms
why.body: Tune systems for small homestead communities, large medieval regions, or mixed-purpose experiences without rebuilding from scratch.

why.title: Built for Community Retention
why.body: Long-term loops, social trade, and collaborative projects keep players returning and give land owners better retention levers.

howItWorks.title: Install Core Modules
howItWorks.body: Deploy HUD and world components for your region goals.

howItWorks.title: Configure Your Economy
howItWorks.body: Set progression pace, resource pressure, and craft pathways.

howItWorks.title: Run Live Story Arcs
howItWorks.body: Use events, recipes, and updates to evolve your world over time.

finalCta.title: Ready to launch your next realm arc?
finalCta.body: Start with player onboarding, then shape systems around your world identity.

players.title: For Players
players.description: Progress through meaningful loops across survival, crafting, and community-driven trade.

hero.headline: Progress That Feels Earned
hero.body: From first harvest to advanced crafting chains, SL Colonies gives players clear goals, social trade opportunities, and roleplay depth.

journey.title: Set Up Your Character
journey.body: Create your avatar and register for the HUD and meter workflow.

journey.title: Gather and Craft
journey.body: Collect resources and move through recipes that open stronger gameplay options.

journey.title: Trade and Collaborate
journey.body: Work with other players, sell output, and build community-driven goals.

journey.title: Join Events and Story Arcs
journey.body: Use live events and social challenges to keep progression meaningful.

worldBuilders.title: For World Builders
worldBuilders.description: Give your region a configurable economic and roleplay backbone.

hero.headline: Design the Experience, Not Just the Map
hero.body: SL Colonies gives world builders a toolkit for progression loops, regional identity, and community retention without forcing one rigid formula.

benefits.title: Configurable Progression
benefits.body: Balance scarcity, output, and pacing to fit your world's narrative and audience.

benefits.title: Retention-Centered Design
benefits.body: Support long-term goals and social interdependence that keeps residents engaged.

benefits.title: Operational Flexibility
benefits.body: Roll out new recipes, systems, and seasonal arcs without replacing your whole setup.

benefits.title: Community-Led Growth
benefits.body: Enable players to generate stories, markets, and events that strengthen your region brand.

systems.title: Systems
systems.description: Explore SL Colonies modules and how they connect into one gameplay fabric.

hero.headline: Mix, Match, and Scale
hero.body: Use the modules you need now, then expand as your world grows.

community.title: Community
community.description: Player stories, visual showcases, and opportunities to engage.

hero.headline: A Living, Player-Driven Culture
hero.body: SL Colonies communities are built by players sharing creations, stories, and social gameplay.

news.title: News and Updates
news.description: Recent SL Colonies updates and adjacent Second Life opportunities.

hero.headline: Track Updates and Move Fast
hero.body: Follow SL Colonies release rhythm and broader Second Life signals relevant to your region strategy.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Common questions about onboarding, setup, and running SL Colonies worlds.

hero.headline: Answers Before You Commit
hero.body: Key setup, operations, and player onboarding details in one place.

getStarted.title: Get Started
getStarted.description: Get live with SL Colonies as a player or world builder.

hero.headline: Launch Your SL Colonies Journey
hero.body: Choose your path, follow practical setup steps, and get connected with the community.
